plans.name: School Plan

plans.priceNote: Final pricing is subject to partnership negotiation

plans.name: Regional Plan
plans.tagline: Ideal for regional-scale deployment and cross-school comparison

faq.question: How do we get started with a pilot?
faq.answer: You can start with a small-scale pilot at a single school. Our team will help with task deployment and teacher training; the exact timeline and process depend on the partnership agreement. [TBD]

faq.question: Who owns the data?
faq.answer: Ownership and usage scope of student behavioral data will be clearly defined in the official partnership agreement. The system follows data anonymization, encrypted storage, and tiered authorization throughout. [TBD]

faq.question: Can the system be customized?
faq.answer: Yes. Both the Regional and Custom plans can be tailored in assessment scope, indicator system, and reporting format — contact us to discuss the details.

disclaimer: Prices shown are indicative only. Final terms are subject to the official partnership agreement.
